phrases.intent_en: Ask about the Roman ruins in the neighbourhood
phrases.text_local: Où se trouvent les vestiges romains de Cimiez ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo seh TROOV lay ves-TEEZH ro-MAN deh see-MYAY
phrases.cultural_note: Cimiez was the Roman town of Cemenelum — its amphitheatre and thermal baths are still visible in the archaeological park.

responses.english: They are right behind the museum, in the park.
responses.phonetic: OO suh TROOV lay ves-TEEZH ro-MAN duh see-MYAY
responses.local: Ils sont juste derrière le musée, dans le parc.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which bus goes to Cimiez from the city centre
phrases.text_local: Quel bus faut-il prendre pour monter à Cimiez depuis le centre-ville ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel BOOS foh-TEEL PRAN-dreh poor mon-TAY ah see-MYAY deh-PWEE leh SAN-treh-VEEL
phrases.cultural_note: Buses 15, 17 and 20 serve Cimiez from the centre. The neighbourhood sits on a hill above Nice with cooler air in summer.

responses.phonetic: KEL boos zhuh PRAHN poor mawn-TAY ah see-MYAY duh-PWEE luh SAHN-truh VEEL
responses.local: Vous devez prendre la ligne 15 ou la 17.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the Cimiez Jazz Festival takes place in the summer
phrases.text_local: Le Festival de Jazz de Nice se déroule-t-il bien à Cimiez en été ?
phrases.pronunciation: leh fes-tee-VAL deh JAZZ deh NEES seh day-ROOL-teel BYAN ah see-MYAY an ay-TAY
phrases.cultural_note: The Nice Jazz Festival in July is held in the Cimiez arena — one of the world's oldest jazz festivals, founded in 1948.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the monastery and its rose garden
phrases.text_local: Le monastère de Cimiez possède-t-il un jardin de roses accessible au public ?
phrases.pronunciation: leh mo-nas-TEHR deh see-MYAY po-SED-teel un zhar-DAN deh ROHZ ak-se-SEEBL oh poo-BLEEK
phrases.cultural_note: The Franciscan monastery garden is famous for its roses and offers a stunning panorama over Nice — entry is free.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for directions to the Matisse Museum from the Roman ruins
phrases.text_local: Comment se rendre au Musée Matisse depuis les arènes romaines ?
phrases.pronunciation: kuh-MAN seh RAN-dreh oh moo-ZAY mah-TEES deh-PWEE lay ah-REN ro-MEN
phrases.cultural_note: The Matisse Museum is directly adjacent to the Roman arena and the monastery — all three can be visited in one visit.

responses.english: From the arenas, it's five minutes on foot, follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: kaw-MAHN suh RAHND-ruh oh moo-ZAY ma-TEES duh-PWEE lay ah-REN roh-MEN
responses.local: Depuis les arènes, c'est cinq minutes à pied, suivez les panneaux.
